name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy for Cursor — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, alert rules, and the in-app feedback/ops inbox. Bundles the shipeasy MCP server plus the same 10 skills the Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot plugins ship (8 area guides + the shipeasy-ops-work workflow loop + the on-demand shipeasy-migrate workflow); no content is duplicated. Cursor reads the MCP server from `./.mcp.json` under `mcpServers` (the hosted HTTP endpoint at mcp.shipeasy.ai). All CRUD is delegated to the shipeasy MCP server or CLI, and deletions are UI-only.

interface.shortDescription: Feature flags, A/B experiments, metrics, translations, and in-app feedback.
